column1: 感じるままに、詩を書いた。
column2: かんじるままに、しをかいた。
column3: I wrote the poem just as I felt.
column4: ままに (as one pleases, just as, following — unrestricted action or passive compliance)
column5: Verb[dict/られる] + ままに / Noun + の + ままに
column6: ままに①: poem written following pure feeling without constraint
column7: ままに①: poem written following pure feeling without constraint
column8: ままに① = as one pleases (active freedom); ままに② = passively following; ままで = leaving as is (state); なりに = in one's own way (within limits)
